content.full_text:
26108

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. BOX 607 • SACRAMENTO, 95814 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95314
Technical Assistance/Administration . . . Executive Legal . . . Enforcement/Conflict of Interest
916 322-5660 322-5501 322-5641

April 26, 1976

Mr. Thomas I. McKnew, Jr.
Asst. General Attorney
The Atchison, Topeka and Santa Fe Railway Co.
121 East Sixth Street
Los Angeles CA 90014

Re: File 126-61(1)

Dear Mr. McKnew:

Thank you for your letter of April 14, 1976,
requesting advice as to your Chapter 6 filing obliga-
tions. At the present time, the Commission is not
requiring membership dues to be reported as payments
to influence. However, the staff has proposed the
enclosed amendments to 2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18618
which would require persons already filing reports to
include the amount of any membership dues which are
used for the purpose of influencing legislative or
administrative action.

The proposed amendments to Section 18618 will
be considered by the Commission at its May 4-6 meeting
in Sacramento. If you wish to testify, please contact
Carla Bailey at 916/322/5901. If you have any further
questions or comments, you may reach me at the afore-
mentioned number.

Sincerely,

Ted Prim
Staff Counsel

TP:pvp
Enclosures
